metadata.title: Nehuen | Fullstack Engineer
metadata.description: Nehuen's Portfolio — Fullstack JavaScript Engineer. Building modern web experiences with React, Next.js, and Node.js.
metadata.name: Nehuen

hero.name: Nehuen Goñi
hero.title: Fullstack Engineer
hero.subtitle: Architecting scalable web ecosystems from concept to deployment. I specialize in building high-performance, accessible interfaces with a focus on Clean Architecture and purposeful engineering that aligns technical precision with user-centric goals

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: Fullstack Software Engineer specialized in delivering fintech and high-availability web applications through the React/Node.js ecosystem.
I bridge the gap between modular frontend architecture and scalable backend systems, implementing Clean Architecture to transform complex business requirements into high-performance digital products.
Driven by engineering excellence, I focus on building maintainable, impact-driven solutions that optimize both user experience and system reliability.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: This portfolio — built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and next-intl for full internationalization support. Features smooth animations and responsive layout.

kmProject.title: Repair & Product Management System
kmProject.description: Built for a real computer repair business (KM Computación, 100+ active clients). Replaced manual paper-based workflows with a full-stack digital system — cutting repair tracking time and eliminating stock discrepancies. Features real-time repair status, inventory management, and customer history.

inmuebles.title: Property Management System
inmuebles.description: Full-stack application to manage rental properties, track tenants, control payments, and handle lease contracts.

mernPacientes.title: Veterinary Patient Manager
mernPacientes.description: MERN stack application for managing veterinary patients with appointment scheduling and clinical history tracking.

trickApp.title: Truco Tournament & History Tracker
trickApp.description: Full-stack TypeScript app for tracking match history and creating tournaments for the Argentine card game Truco.

botHood.title: Birthday Reminder Bot
botHood.description: Automated Node.js bot that sends birthday notifications to groups, keeping track of upcoming birthdays automatically.

job1.title: Fullstack Developer
description: Built modular UI components using React/MUI, increasing code reusability by 30% across complex enterprise workflows.
Applied lazy loading and memoization techniques, reducing bundle size by 40% and improving Lighthouse scores.
Integrated REST APIs and global state management, cutting data sync latency by 20% in high-availability systems.
Streamlined UI/UX handoff implementing standardized design systems, reducing dev time by 25%.
Led rigorous code reviews enforcing Clean Code standards, decreasing post-release bugs by 18%.

job2.title: Technical Lead & Owner
description: Achieved a 95%+ first-fix rate on hardware diagnostics and PC repairs, significantly reducing device turnaround times.
Managed end-to-end inventory and invoicing, reducing stock discrepancies by 15% through automated auditing processes.
Optimized procurement costs and streamlined account reconciliation with key hardware suppliers.
Increased client retention rates by managing a diverse account portfolio and providing specialized technical advisory.

contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk!
